steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The underlined sentence reads: "This evidence is exciting because it could help us better understand how M. symmetrica is related to other arthropods, such as cave crickets and krill." The phrase "exciting because" signals the sentence is giving a reason why the finding matters.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'It indicates that the team's claims about the M. symmetrica fossils are incorrect.': the passage frames the evidence positively; nothing challenges the team's claims. ✗
  • Choice B — 'It gives the definition of the term "synganglion" used earlier in the text.': synganglion was already defined ("a brain-like mass of nerve tissue") earlier in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C — 'It explains why the team's finding of a possible synganglion is exciting.': this directly matches "exciting because" — the sentence explains the significance of the synganglion discovery for understanding arthropod relationships. ✓
  • Choice D — 'It states that krill are arthropods but cave crickets are not.': the passage lists both cave crickets and krill as examples of arthropods. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
